---
title: "Belgrave Hospital for Children, The"
---

## Belgrave Hospital for Children, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This organisation, founded in Cumberland Street, Pimlico, in 1866, is referred to in <i>MP</i> (January 1871) and in a letter to an unknown woman (1 August ?1871). It moved to Kennington in the twentieth century, merged in 1948 with King\'s College Hospital, which retains its archives, and was closed in 1985.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
